title: A 59-Year-Old Hunger Striker Joins a Gen Z Protest Movement in India
summary_full: Sonam Wangchuk, a longtime activist, has fasted for 19 days, joining forces with a student-led campaign to change India’s education system.
summary_public: Sonam Wangchuk, a longtime activist, has fasted for 19 days, joining forces with a student-led campaign to change India’s education system.
